query: Could you please create a travel plan for 2 people who are departing from Clarksburg and heading to Chicago? The travel duration will be 3 days, starting from March 10th to March 12th, 2022. Our budget is set at $2,400 for this trip. It is important to note that we need non-shared rooms for accommodation.
